nodes.label: Test suite for MongoDB adapter client operations.  Tests MongoDBClient connectio
Test initialization with valid configuration (no auto-connect by default).
Test that initialization automatically connects when auto_connect=True.
Test that connect() is idempotent (doesn't reconnect if already connected).
Test that resources are cleaned up on connection failure.
Test switching to a different database.
Test use_database without connection raises RuntimeError.
Test switching to a different collection.
Test use_collection without database raises RuntimeError.
Test query operations (find_one, find, count_documents, aggregate).
Test find_one returns None when document not found.
Test find with no matching documents.
Test count_documents returns 0 for no matches.
Test aggregate with no matching documents.
Test insert_one returns ObjectId as string.
Test insert_one handles duplicate key errors.
Test insert_one handles general PyMongo errors.
Test insert_many returns list of inserted IDs.
Test update_one when no document matches.
Test update_many when some documents are already up-to-date.
Test delete_one when no document matches.
Test delete_many when no documents match.
Test is_healthy returns True when connection is healthy.
Test is_healthy returns False when client is not connected.
Test is_healthy returns False when ping fails.
Test get_connection without connection raises RuntimeError.
Test advanced features (get_client, close, context manager).
Test get_client returns underlying PyMongo client.
Test get_client returns None when not connected.
Test close() closes connection and cleans up.
Test close() can be called multiple times.
Test context manager closes connection even with exception.
Test that provided connection_uri is used as-is.
Test URI building with X.509 authentication.
Test _cleanup_temp_files logs warnings but doesn't raise when removal fails.
